CVE-2022-2787.title: Schroot before 1.6.13 had too permissive rules on chroot or sessi ...
CVE-2022-2787.description: Schroot before 1.6.13 had too permissive rules on chroot or session names, allowing a denial of service on the schroot service for all users that may start a schroot session.
